ShortDescription.Value: Export Cities: Skylines II metro networks to JSON for local SVG diagram preview.

Publish.LongDescription:
CS2 Metro Diagram exports the metro/subway network of your currently loaded Cities: Skylines II city to a local JSON file.
Open the export with the separate Windows Viewer app to render a clean, readable metro map and save it as SVG. The default schematic-anneal layout draws lines horizontal/vertical/45-degree, renders shared tracks as parallel lines, and fills the canvas.
Alpha notes: - Metro/subway only. - Exports data only; it does not edit city data. - No in-game SVG preview. - The Viewer is packaged separately in the GitHub release bundle.
Publish.ChangeLog: Alpha.2: - New default map: schematic-anneal, a clean octilinear layout by global optimization. Shared tracks now render as parallel lines and the map fills the canvas. - Straight lines stay straight (fixed kinks on through-running lines). - Redesigned Viewer: new look, opens your city fit-to-width right away, advanced settings tucked away. - Simplified in-game options: pick an export folder and click Export Real Metro JSON. Developer test/debug export buttons removed. - Geographic mode is still available for faithful real geometry.
